description: Style NoteGo for a look that is bold and beautiful with this handmade necklace from adrika. Its stylish design adds a touch of glamour to your wardrobe. Pair it with any outfit for a look that is ethnic yet modern.Product DetailsThree strand golden coloured necklace with black, grey and transparent beads on the longest strandMaterial and CareGlass beads and brass chainWipe with soft cloth to maintain shine and keep away dust and dirtSizeLength of necklace: 46 cm
